description: Lovely 3-bedroom, 3-bathroom family townhome in the popular Madison complex, featuring a fully fenced, south-facing backyard off the main-floor family room - ideal for kids, family and friends get-togethers, and summer BBQs! Quietly located within the complex, this home offers an open-concept main floor with 9-foot ceilings, laminate flooring, fireplace, and a 2-piece powder room. The kitchen includes upgraded stainless steel appliances, shaker-style cabinets, granite countertops (throughout), designer lighting, and large windows. Additional features include acoustically engineered party walls and a high-efficiency gas furnace. Close to Bell Centre, schools, shopping, YMCA, and transit! Make an appointment today to view!
